hypothesis: Incorporating a motion-consistency loss based on the LEONARDO physics-informed diffusion model into SAM-EM fine-tuning will reduce particle identity-switching events by at least 50% (measured as switches per 1,000 frames) on high-density LPTEM videos (>6 particles per 1024×1024 frame) at 150 nm liquid thickness compared to SAM-EM fine-tuned without this loss.
